title: eriogonum trachygonum subsp. subscaposum
intro: Eriogonum trachygonum subsp. subscaposum, also known as Desert Buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Desert Buckwheat include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Desert Buckwheat include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
